Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Lives up to its name!! So delightful. Made it through the first technical crux on the blankf ace, which was super interesting, but biffed it under the first big roof at the end of the slab because I pumped out and misplaced my feet. Fell another time right after the burly, juggy undercling. The stretch from the last clip to the anchors is easier than it seems! Definitely a 5 star climb!

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Early crux to a jug haul with interesting movement. Fun to onsight!

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Morten Pa.
Notes: It's a bolted line but goes on trad. Some really creative placements, but never really unsafe, and the tough parts are plenty well protected! What a delight.

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Morten Pa.
Notes: Really fun movement on thin holds :)

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe., Yoyo Li.
Notes: Fell on the third bolt a couple times trying to suss out the right sequence. Interesting beta and movement! Really weird getting to the anchor for both of these climbs, definitely detracts from the quality.

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe., Yoyo Li.
Notes: Fell just below the anchor because I tried to go direct, but you actually dodge well out right to avoid the face. Got it no problem after I went the right way!

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Super fun, thin crux! Pretty happy to pull this one off

Partner(s): Kimberly O’., Evelyn De., Knut Oe.
Notes: Pretty easy, but a good warmup! Trickier than the grade woudl lead one to believe
Bakom Synger Skogene at 41, near Gol. An absolute romp, fun but short hand/finger crack at the top
Hoppalong at 41, near Gol. Fun, forced side pull crux!
Litten Oppdrift at 41, near Gol. Fell when I mussed up the crux beta. Maybe I'll get it another day!
Litten Oppdrift at 41, near Gol. Fell sussing out the crux beta

Hallingmarsjen, Norway grade 5, near 40.  Bootied a locker part way up, felt tougher than 5 at the crux, but maybe I was missing some holds. Somewhat committing, it can be rapped with a 60 in two raps, but it's traversing and about 35-40 meters in length, so there's no backing off for the second. This crag is the most jankey crag I've ever been to; you have to do super wacky, exposed shit to even get to the base of some climbs!
http://heihaaklatring.blogspot.com/2019/09/tyribakken-40.html?m=1
Helgepraten, Norway grade 6, near 40. Bootied two whole quick draws, one from the route next door!
